Qualification scenarios

From completed group results. A team is Through if guaranteed top two, Eliminated if it cannot reach the top three (third place can still qualify via best thirds), otherwise Alive. Ranked by closeness to clinching.

Disciplinary points (fair-play tiebreak) and manual entry
Lower is better. These only decide a place when two teams are level on points, goal difference and goals. Edit to override; the bracket and scenarios recompute.
